name: dotnet-semantic-tools
description: Roslyn semantic navigation, diagnostics, impact analysis, and safe refactor previews for C#/.NET repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Roslyn semantic tools for C# and .NET repositories.
interface.longDescription: Adds local-first Roslyn MCP tools for repository overview, symbol navigation, references, diagnostics, impact analysis, context packing, and safe refactor previews.
defaultPrompt: Use Roslyn semantic tools for C#/.NET navigation, references, diagnostics, impact analysis, and refactor planning before raw text search.
Prefer compact semantic summaries first. Request source only when an edit requires it.
